title: Severance user config
description: ~/.claude/severance/config.json — the priority ladder and resume stagger. Projects declare how much they matter; the ladder decides when they trip, analogous to under-frequency load shedding (PRD §5.4).

resume_stagger_minutes.description: Minutes between priority bands during priority-ordered resume (default 15).

defaults.description: Optional user-level default values for SEVERANCE_* variables (resolution order §5.4: project env > this > built-in defaults).

band.description: One priority band's thresholds. null disables that gate for the band.

session.description: Session (5h) utilization trip threshold; null = session gate off.

weekly.description: Weekly (7d) utilization trip threshold; null = weekly gate off.

reserve.description: Preemption headroom threshold (§5.6); null = this band never preempts lower ones.
